source_formulae: P0R04674: 3. The Dynamic Connectome and Functional Connectivity:

P0R04675: The functional connectivity (statistical dependencies between brain regions) is dynamic and reconfigures rapidly to support cognitive demands. The structural Connectome (L3) constrains the possible functional configurations (L4).

specs.section_path: > 5.2 Embodied SCPN: Cellular, Neural, & Systemic Implementation > III. The Dynamics of the Coherent Brain (Domain I: L4) > 3. The Dynamic Connectome and Functional Connectivity:
source_formulae: P0R04678: 1. Hierarchical Predictive Coding (HPC) and the Canonical Microcircuit:
P0R04679: The cortex implements HPC via a repeating motif: the Canonical Microcircuit.

P0R04680: The Circuitry of Prediction: Priors (Generative Model): Encoded by Pyramidal Cells in Deep Layers (V/VI), associated with top-down flow (Alpha/Beta oscillations). | Prediction Errors: Encoded by Pyramidal Cells in Superficial Layers (II/III), associated with bottom-up flow (Gamma oscillations). | Precision Weighting: Modulated by neuromodulators (DA, ACh) and inhibitory interneurons (e.g., SST, PV), controlling the gain of prediction errors (Attention). | Minimising Free Energy (F): The entire architecture functions to minimise F, optimising the brain's internal model of the world.
test_protocols: preserve 1. Hierarchical Predictive Coding (HPC) and the Canonical Microcircuit: source-accounting boundary

specs.section_path: > 5.2 Embodied SCPN: Cellular, Neural, & Systemic Implementation > III. The Dynamics of the Coherent Brain (Domain I: L4) > 3. The Dynamic Connectome and Functional Connectivity:
source_formulae: P0R04681: 2. The Self, the DMN, and the Strange Loop:
P0R04682: The Self emerges as a self-referential Strange Loop, physically grounded in the Default Mode Network (DMN).

P0R04683: The DMN as the Narrative Core: The DMN (mPFC, PCC, Precuneus) generates the narrative self, modelling the "I" across time. It is the highest level of the HPC hierarchy, encoding the most abstract priors about the self. | The Fixed Point (I=Model(I)): The sustained activity of the DMN at criticality creates the stable fixed point (the Self-soliton emerging via SSB) that corresponds to the subjective experience of "being."
test_protocols: preserve 2. The Self, the DMN, and the Strange Loop: source-accounting boundary
